response.global_analysis: The audio consists of a speech by the VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis. There are no lyrics as it is a monologue/MC segment. The audio matches the speaker's known voice and persona. Pacing is moderate with some rapid enthusiasm, so I am using precise timestamps and splitting blocks to ensure readability and sync. I have transcribed the spoken English and included the Japanese honorifics and song titles as spoken.

subtitles.original: Are you guys enjoying the show so far?
subtitles.english: Are you guys enjoying the show so far?

subtitles.original: You know, I was really...
subtitles.english: You know, I was really...

subtitles.original: I want to talk about TakoTako first because...
subtitles.english: I want to talk about TakoTako first because...

subtitles.original: ...yesterday, I heard you guys sing along to the instrumental...
subtitles.english: ...yesterday, I heard you guys sing along to the instrumental...

subtitles.original: ...and I was like, "Uh... ooh, I feel bad for not singing on Day 1."
subtitles.english: ...and I was like, "Uh... ooh, I feel bad for not singing on Day 1."

subtitles.original: But you know, I knew I was opening for, you know, Day 2...
subtitles.english: But you know, I knew I was opening for, you know, Day 2...

subtitles.original: ...so I couldn't have thought of a better song to open than TakoTako.
subtitles.english: ...so I couldn't have thought of a better song to open than TakoTako.

subtitles.original: Hope you guys had fun singing it!
subtitles.english: Hope you guys had fun singing it!

subtitles.original: Thank you again!
subtitles.english: Thank you again!

subtitles.original: And of course, I sang two of my senpais' songs...
subtitles.english: And of course, I sang two of my senpais' songs...

subtitles.original: ...Sencho's "Dead Man's Chest"...
subtitles.english: ...Sencho's "Dead Man's Chest"...

subtitles.original: ...and Towa-sama's "Palette".
subtitles.english: ...and Towa-sama's "Palette".

subtitles.original: I specifically wanted to choose their songs because...
subtitles.english: I specifically wanted to choose their songs because...

subtitles.original: ...they're senpais that I really look up to...
subtitles.english: ...they're senpais that I really look up to...

subtitles.original: ...and I always feel like my journey here wouldn't have been possible...
subtitles.english: ...and I always feel like my journey here wouldn't have been possible...

subtitles.original: ...if I didn't discover my senpais many, many years ago.
subtitles.english: ...if I didn't discover my senpais many, many years ago.

subtitles.original: And I always wanted to pay respect to the path they paved for us.
subtitles.english: And I always wanted to pay respect to the path they paved for us.

subtitles.original: So, yeah, I hope you guys enjoyed it!
subtitles.english: So, yeah, I hope you guys enjoyed it!

subtitles.original: I'm so nervous again!
subtitles.english: I'm so nervous again!

subtitles.original: And, you know, I of course didn't really tell you guys...
subtitles.english: And, you know, I of course didn't really tell you guys...

subtitles.original: ...specifically what penlight colors to use...
subtitles.english: ...specifically what penlight colors to use...

subtitles.original: ...but I knew that you guys would get my message...
subtitles.english: ...but I knew that you guys would get my message...

subtitles.original: ...because we share a brain cell, right? Right?
subtitles.english: ...because we share a brain cell, right? Right?

subtitles.original: And yeah, so... well, um...
subtitles.english: And yeah, so... well, um...

subtitles.original: ...now going by the different setlist...
subtitles.english: ...now going by the different setlist...

subtitles.original: ...because we have different setlists for Day 1 and Day 2...
subtitles.english: ...because we have different setlists for Day 1 and Day 2...

subtitles.original: ...so, going by the process of elimination...
subtitles.english: ...so, going by the process of elimination...

subtitles.original: ...we have a couple of songs from my new EP left, actually.
subtitles.english: ...we have a couple of songs from my new EP left, actually.

subtitles.original: Who here bought my EP?
subtitles.english: Who here bought my EP?

subtitles.original: Yay! Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: I hope you were lucky to get an autograph. I tried to sign as much as possible...
subtitles.english: I hope you were lucky to get an autograph. I tried to sign as much as possible...

subtitles.original: ...but I knew, you know, sometimes you can't be lucky.
subtitles.english: ...but I knew, you know, sometimes you can't be lucky.

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: But yeah, I want you guys to have even more fun than before today!
subtitles.english: But yeah, I want you guys to have even more fun than before today!

subtitles.original: I mean, you always have fun, so that's good.
subtitles.english: I mean, you always have fun, so that's good.

subtitles.original: But um... yeah! Sing along, have fun...
subtitles.english: But um... yeah! Sing along, have fun...

subtitles.original: ...and I always think that a live stage is where not only me performing...
subtitles.english: ...and I always think that a live stage is where not only me performing...

subtitles.original: ...is creating the performance, but you guys as well.
subtitles.english: ...is creating the performance, but you guys as well.

subtitles.original: You really help everyone with that special experience.
subtitles.english: You really help everyone with that special experience.

subtitles.original: So let's create an unforgettable memory together today, okay?
subtitles.english: So let's create an unforgettable memory together today, okay?

subtitles.original: Nyah!
subtitles.english: Nyah!

subtitles.original: Anyways, I would also like to shout out...
subtitles.english: Anyways, I would also like to shout out...

subtitles.original: to those watching at home and at the live viewing in the cinema.
subtitles.english: to those watching at home and at the live viewing in the cinema.

subtitles.original: Hello, hello to you again!
subtitles.english: Hello, hello to you again!

subtitles.original: And also, to the lovely girls doing a watchalong right now.
subtitles.english: And also, to the lovely girls doing a watchalong right now.

subtitles.original: Hi guys! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Hi guys! Thank you!

subtitles.original: IRyS, EN, and everyone else doing the watchalong.
subtitles.english: IRyS, EN, and everyone else doing the watchalong.

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you! You know, I'm always amazed by everyone's support.
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you! You know, I'm always amazed by everyone's support.

subtitles.original: And really without the support of Holo EN members as well...
subtitles.english: And really without the support of Holo EN members as well...

subtitles.original: ...I wouldn't have had the confidence to stand here today.
subtitles.english: ...I wouldn't have had the confidence to stand here today.

subtitles.original: Thank you, I love you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, I love you!

subtitles.original: And of course, I would like to remind you guys about the hashtag...
subtitles.english: And of course, I would like to remind you guys about the hashtag...

subtitles.original: ...for today's concert as well, #TakoTori1stConcert.
subtitles.english: ...for today's concert as well, #TakoTori1stConcert.

subtitles.original: As usual, post your thoughts about it, post the screenshots.
subtitles.english: As usual, post your thoughts about it, post the screenshots.

subtitles.original: No videos, no videos!
subtitles.english: No videos, no videos!

subtitles.original: Post the screenshots and, you know, Kiara and I...
subtitles.english: Post the screenshots and, you know, Kiara and I...

subtitles.original: ...whenever we have time, we've been checking the hashtag.
subtitles.english: ...whenever we have time, we've been checking the hashtag.

subtitles.original: And of course after as well, I want to hear what you guys thought about the live.
subtitles.english: And of course after as well, I want to hear what you guys thought about the live.

subtitles.original: So, yeah! Thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: So, yeah! Thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: And unlike yesterday, first MC means...
subtitles.english: And unlike yesterday, first MC means...

subtitles.original: ...I unfortunately have to bid farewell to those watching the sneak peek on YouTube.
subtitles.english: ...I unfortunately have to bid farewell to those watching the sneak peek on YouTube.

subtitles.english: I'm sorry!

subtitles.english: But if you want to keep the party going...

subtitles.original: ...head to the streaming site via the description or the comment.
subtitles.english: ...head to the streaming site via the description or the comment.

subtitles.original: I don't know where the comment is!
subtitles.english: I don't know where the comment is!

subtitles.original: But I know that some of you guys won't get a chance...
subtitles.english: But I know that some of you guys won't get a chance...

subtitles.original: ...to see my new outfit that I revealed yesterday.
